[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000011 2
1 01011001 4
2 11011000 4
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 10010000 2
7 10100110 4

01 10 10000000 1
12 21 10000100 2
23 32 10010001 3
34 43 00000011 2 match 0
45 54 00000011 2 match 0
56 65 00000001 1
67 76 01011000 3
70 07 10010000 2 match 6

02 20 10010000 2 match 6
13 31 10100010 3
24 42 00000101 2
35 53 00000011 2 match 0
46 64 01000001 2
57 75 00000000 a match 3 4 5
60 06 00010000 1
71 17 10000000 1

03 30 10010000 2 match 6
14 41 00000110 2
25 52 00000001 1
36 63 00011001 3
47 74 01000000 1
50 05 00000000 a match 3 4 5
61 16 00000000 a match 3 4 5
72 27 10010000 2 match 6

04 40 00000000 a match 3 4 5
15 51 00000010 1
26 62 00010001 2
37 73 10011000 3
